message:
feat(config): implement config parser for new allowlist schema

Implements E5-T2: Config parser for context-aware allowlisting with
backward compatibility.

Changes:
- Add AllowlistRule struct with path, expires, ttl_seconds, session fields
- Add allowlist and allowlist_rules fields to OverridesConfig
- Update compile() to process both simple and extended allowlist formats
- Add load_allowlist() method for unified rule retrieval
- Add validate_allowlist() method for validation
- Add is_active() and is_global() helper methods to AllowlistRule
- Add comprehensive tests for new functionality

The parser supports:
- Simple format: allowlist = ["npm run build", "cargo test"]
- Extended format: [[allowlist_rules]] with pattern, paths, comment, expires

Bead: git_safety_guard-fvuf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
